title: melasma calycinum
intro: Melasma calycinum, also known as the sticky-leaved geranium, is a plant species in the family Geraniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Melasma calycinum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
